ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was released */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the album (e.g., Standard, Deluxe) */,
  "album_cover_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the album cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the album */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the popularity of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record label the artist is associated with */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the artist's profile image */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the record label */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the record label's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the label was founded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, label rep, admin) */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile image */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was provided */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review or comment for the album */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)
